summary: Frontend-only validation for iteration 7: 4 new example cards (football, etsy, accountant, estate-agent) and new AiFrustration section on Home. All acceptance criteria met. No console errors. No mobile horizontal overflow.

home_page.section_order_correct: AiReady -> AiFrustration -> Services (verified via DOM index)
home_page.headline_text: Don't let AI prompting frustrate you anymore.

critical_code_review_comments: AiFrustration.jsx is clean and self-contained (~160 lines).
examplesContent.js is data-only and well structured; categories array correctly maps etsy into both digital and retail as intended.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 7 verified: 10 example cards on /examples with filter-pro added and etsy in both digital+retail; AiFrustration section on Home between AiReady and Services with 4 BA cards and 3 CTAs. All data-testids present. No mobile overflow at 375px. No console errors.
